name: solon
description: Hashline read/edit, AST-grep, LSP tools, and workflow skills for Claude Code

skills.name: hashline-read
skills.description: Read files with hashline annotations for reliable line-range editing

skills.name: hashline-edit
skills.description: Edit files using hashline line references for reliable, hash-validated edits

skills.name: ast-search
skills.description: Search code semantically using AST patterns across the codebase

skills.name: ast-replace
skills.description: Replace code patterns using AST-aware structural transformations

skills.name: lsp-tools
skills.description: LSP diagnostics, hover, references, and code actions via language servers

skills.name: brainstorm
skills.description: Brainstorm solutions with trade-off analysis, research delegation, and structured debate

skills.name: plan
skills.description: Create detailed implementation plans with configurable workflow modes (fast/hard/parallel/two)

skills.name: cook
skills.description: Execute plan phases end-to-end with progress tracking, quality gates, and agent delegation

skills.name: test
skills.description: Delegate test suite execution to tester agent with plan-aware context and structured reporting

skills.name: review
skills.description: Delegate code review to code-reviewer agent with severity levels and plan compliance checks
